settings.html:
<!--
  TiffinGrab — "Common Questions" FAQ grid + CTA (Elementor HTML widget).
  Home stack band 4 of 4: light strip #fff8f6 (alternates with peach #fdeae2). CTA: peach/orange card, brand glow, magnetic pills. Orange #f06b1a, WhatsApp global.
-->
<!-- Fonts loaded once in home-2026-hero-tags.html (template 9825). -->
<section class="tg-faq" id="tg-common-faq" aria-labelledby="tg-faq-title">
  <style>
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-common-faq) .elementor-widget-container,
    .elementor-widget-html-custom:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .elementor-widget-html-custom:has(#tg-common-faq) .elementor-widget-container,
    .elementor-widget-wrap:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .elementor-column:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .elementor-column-wrap:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .elementor-section:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .e-con:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .e-con-inner:has(#tg-common-faq) {
      overflow: visible !important;
      background-color: #fff8f6 !important;
      background-image: none !important;
    }
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-common-faq),
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-common-faq) .elementor-widget-container {
      max-width: none !important;
    }
    .tg-faq {
      --tg-brand-green: var(--e-global-color-whatsapp, #25d366);
      --faq-on: #231a15;
      --faq-muted: #564339;
      --faq-bg: #fff8f6;
      --faq-surface: #fdeae2;
      --faq-surface-low: #fff1eb;
      --faq-card: #ffffff;
      --faq-primary: #f06b1a;
      /* Same mid/hover as hero + service-area CTAs (no coral shift) */
      --faq-primary-mid: #e85f0f;
      --faq-primary-bright: #ff9348;
      --faq-secondary: #006d37;
      --faq-outline: rgba(220, 193, 181, 0.15);
      --faq-shadow: 0 24px 32px -12px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.06);
      --faq-shadow-hover: 0 32px 48px -16px rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.12);
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      color: var(--faq-on);
      background: var(--faq-bg);
      width: 100vw;
      max-width: none;
      margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
      margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
      padding: clamp(3.5rem, 7vw, 6rem) clamp(1.25rem, 4vw, 2rem);
      box-sizing: border-box;
      overflow-x: clip;
    }
    @supports (width: 100dvw) {
      .tg-faq {
        width: 100dvw;
        margin-left: calc(50% - 50dvw);
        margin-right: calc(50% - 50dvw);
      }
    }
    .tg-faq * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    .tg-faq .material-symbols-outlined {
      font-variation-settings: "FILL" 0, "wght" 400, "GRAD" 0, "opsz" 24;
    }
    .tg-faq-inner {
      max-width: 1180px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .tg-faq-head {
      text-align: center;
      max-width: 42rem;
      margin: 0 auto clamp(2.75rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    }
    .tg-faq-overline {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 0.35rem 1rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--faq-primary);
      background: rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.07);
      outline: 1px solid rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.28);
      margin: 0 0 1.1rem;
    }
    .tg-faq h2#tg-faq-title {
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
      line-height: 1.12;
      font-size: clamp(1.85rem, 4vw, 3rem);
      margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
      color: var(--faq-on);
    }
    .tg-faq-sub {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.2vw, 1.125rem);
      line-height: 1.65;
      color: var(--faq-muted);
    }
    .tg-faq-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: clamp(1.25rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
    }
    @media (min-width: 640px) {
      .tg-faq-grid {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      }
    }
    @media (min-width: 1024px) {
      .tg-faq-grid {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      }
    }
    /* <details> FAQ: mobile = tap to expand; desktop = grid + forced open via script */
    details.tg-faq-card {
      position: relative;
      margin: 0;
      padding: clamp(1.75rem, 3vw, 2rem);
      background: var(--faq-card);
      border-radius: 1rem;
      box-shadow: var(--faq-shadow);
      outline: 1px solid var(--faq-outline);
      outline-offset: 0;
      border: none;
      transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, outline-color 0.3s ease;
    }
    @media (hover: hover) {
      details.tg-faq-card:hover {
        box-shadow: var(--faq-shadow-hover);
        outline-color: rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.22);
      }
    }
    details.tg-faq-card > summary {
      list-style: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    }
    details.tg-faq-card > summary::-webkit-details-marker {
      display: none;
    }
    details.tg-faq-card > summary::marker {
      content: "";
    }
    .tg-faq-card-icon {
      color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--faq-primary) 22%, transparent);
      pointer-events: none;
      transform-origin: center;
      transition: color 0.35s ease, transform 0.35s ease, filter 0.35s ease;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .tg-faq-card-icon .material-symbols-outlined {
      display: block;
      transition: inherit;
    }
    @media (hover: hover) {
      details.tg-faq-card:hover .tg-faq-card-icon {
        color: var(--faq-primary-bright);
        filter: brightness(1.12) saturate(1.25);
        transform: scale(1.08);
      }
    }
    .tg-faq-card-q {
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.3;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      min-width: 0;
      color: var(--faq-on);
    }
    .tg-faq-card-chev {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-left: auto;
      font-size: 1.5rem !important;
      color: var(--faq-muted);
      transition: transform 0.25s ease;
    }
    details.tg-faq-card[open] .tg-faq-card-chev {
      transform: rotate(180deg);
      color: var(--faq-primary);
    }
    .tg-faq-card-answer p {
      margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
      font-size: 0.98rem;
      line-height: 1.65;
      color: var(--faq-muted);
    }
    .tg-faq-card-answer .tg-faq-tag {
      display: inline-block;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--faq-primary);
    }
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      details.tg-faq-card {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
        grid-template-rows: auto auto auto;
        column-gap: 0.65rem;
        align-items: start;
        text-align: left;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > summary {
        display: contents;
        cursor: default;
        pointer-events: none;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > summary .tg-faq-card-icon {
        grid-column: 2;
        grid-row: 1;
        justify-self: end;
        align-self: start;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > summary .tg-faq-card-q {
        grid-column: 1;
        grid-row: 1;
        margin: 0 0 0.85rem;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > summary .tg-faq-card-chev {
        display: none !important;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > .tg-faq-card-answer {
        display: contents;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > .tg-faq-card-answer > p {
        grid-column: 1 / -1;
        grid-row: 2;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > .tg-faq-card-answer > .tg-faq-tag {
        grid-column: 1 / -1;
        grid-row: 3;
        margin-top: 0;
        align-self: start;
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 767px) {
      details.tg-faq-card > summary {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 0.65rem;
        text-align: left;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > summary .tg-faq-card-q {
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 0;
        font-size: 1.05rem;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > .tg-faq-card-answer {
        margin-top: 1rem;
        padding-top: 1rem;
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(220, 193, 181, 0.35);
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > .tg-faq-card-answer p {
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
      }
    }
    /* CTA: peach band (#fdeae2 family) + warm orange glow — matches service-area / page alternation */
    .tg-faq-cta {
      margin-top: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5rem);
      position: relative;
      isolation: isolate;
      min-height: clamp(18rem, 52vw, 26rem);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem) clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
      border-radius: 1.5rem;
      background: linear-gradient(
        165deg,
        var(--faq-surface) 0%,
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--faq-primary) 16%, var(--faq-surface)) 48%,
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--faq-primary) 22%, var(--faq-surface-low)) 100%
      );
      border: 1px solid rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.22);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55),
        0 20px 44px -24px rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.18),
        0 12px 32px -20px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.08);
      text-align: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .tg-faq-cta::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      top: clamp(3.5rem, 12vw, 6rem);
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 135%;
      height: min(78%, 22rem);
      max-width: 56rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      background: linear-gradient(
        90deg,
        rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.2) 0%,
        rgba(255, 248, 246, 0.75) 38%,
        rgba(255, 241, 235, 0.65) 55%,
        color-mix(in srgb, var(--tg-brand-green) 12%, transparent) 72%,
        rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.16) 100%
      );
      filter: blur(46px);
    }
    .tg-faq-cta-inner {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 1.75rem);
      max-width: 42rem;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .tg-faq-cta .tg-faq-cta-heading {
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.85rem, 4.5vw, 3.05rem);
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      line-height: 1.12;
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--faq-on);
    }
    .tg-faq-cta .tg-faq-cta-heading .tg-faq-cta-accent {
      color: var(--faq-primary);
      font-weight: 800;
      font-style: normal;
    }
    .tg-faq-cta .tg-faq-cta-lede {
      margin: 0;
      max-width: 36rem;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.15vw, 1.125rem);
      line-height: 1.65;
      color: var(--faq-on);
      font-weight: 500;
      opacity: 0.88;
    }
    .tg-faq-cta-actions {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: row;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 0.65rem;
      width: 100%;
    }
    /* CTA pills: center label; white disc stays absolutely positioned on the right */
    #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-cta-actions a.tg-faq-magnetic,
    #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-cta-actions a.tg-faq-magnetic:link,
    #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-cta-actions a.tg-faq-magnetic:visited {
      justify-content: center;
    }
    #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-cta-actions .tg-faq-magnetic-label {
      text-align: center;
    }
    /* Pill + sliding white disc (same idea as reference Button / hero), no Shadcn */
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic,
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:link,
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:visited {
      position: relative;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: flex-start;
      width: fit-content;
      max-width: 100%;
      min-height: 3rem;
      height: 3rem;
      padding: 0.25rem 3.5rem 0.25rem 1.5rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-decoration: none !important;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      line-height: 1.2;
      transition: padding 0.5s ease, background-color 0.35s ease, filter 0.25s ease;
      -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
      box-shadow: none;
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:hover,
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:focus-visible {
      padding: 0.25rem 1.5rem 0.25rem 3.5rem;
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.55);
      outline-offset: 3px;
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--wa:focus-visible {
      outline-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--tg-brand-green) 65%, #0d3d22);
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic .tg-faq-magnetic-label {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      color: #ffffff !important;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: #ffffff;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic .tg-faq-magnetic-knob {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      right: 0.25rem;
      width: 2.5rem;
      height: 2.5rem;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: #ffffff;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      transition: right 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
      z-index: 1;
      pointer-events: none;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:hover .tg-faq-magnetic-knob,
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:focus-visible .tg-faq-magnetic-knob {
      right: calc(100% - 2.75rem);
    }
    /* Arrow up-right (Lucide-style) on orange */
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--primary .tg-faq-magnetic-knob::before {
      content: "";
      display: block;
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A//www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2024%2024%22%20fill%3D%22none%22%20stroke%3D%22%23231a15%22%20stroke-width%3D%222.25%22%20stroke-linecap%3D%22round%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M7%2017L17%207%22/%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M7%207h10v10%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
        center / contain no-repeat;
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--primary:hover .tg-faq-magnetic-knob,
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--primary:focus-visible .tg-faq-magnetic-knob {
      transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg);
    }
    /* WhatsApp glyph in disc; slide only (no 45° rotate) */
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--wa .tg-faq-magnetic-knob::before {
      content: "";
      display: block;
      width: 17px;
      height: 17px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A//www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2024%2024%22%3E%3Cpath%20fill%3D%22%2325d366%22%20d%3D%22M17.472%2014.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94%201.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198%200-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04%201.016-1.04%202.479%200%201.462%201.065%202.875%201.213%203.074.149.198%202.096%203.2%205.077%204.487.709.306%201.262.489%201.694.625.712.227%201.36.195%201.871.118.571-.085%201.758-.719%202.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421%207.403h-.004a9.87%209.87%200%2001-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86%209.86%200%2001-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45%204.436-9.884%209.888-9.884%202.64%200%205.122%201.03%206.988%202.898a9.825%209.825%200%20012.893%206.994c-.003%205.45-4.435%209.884-9.883%209.884m8.413-18.297A11.815%2011.815%200%200012.05%200C5.495%200%20.16%205.335.157%2011.892c0%202.096.547%204.142%201.588%205.945L.057%2024l6.305-1.654a11.882%2011.882%200%20005.683%201.448h.005c6.554%200%2011.89-5.335%2011.893-11.893a11.821%2011.821%200%2000-3.48-8.413Z%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
        center / contain no-repeat;
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--primary {
      background: var(--faq-primary) !important;
      background-color: var(--faq-primary) !important;
      color: #ffffff !important;
    }
    @media (hover: hover) {
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--primary:hover {
        background-color: var(--faq-primary-mid) !important;
      }
    }
    #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--wa {
      background: var(--tg-brand-green) !important;
      background-color: var(--tg-brand-green) !important;
      color: #ffffff !important;
    }
    @media (hover: hover) {
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--wa:hover {
        background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--tg-brand-green) 88%, #063a1f) !important;
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 767px) {
      /*
        Full-bleed uses margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw). That 50% is the *parent* width, not the
        viewport, so inside Elementor columns the whole band (and peach CTA) shifts sideways—often right.
        On small screens stay in-flow so the section and CTA stay centered.
      */
      #tg-common-faq.tg-faq {
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: 100% !important;
        margin-left: 0 !important;
        margin-right: 0 !important;
      }
      .tg-faq {
        padding-left: max(1rem, env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px));
        padding-right: max(1rem, env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px));
        -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
      }
      /* Center section title + subcopy (theme/Elementor often forces left align) */
      #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-inner {
        width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
      }
      #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-head {
        text-align: center !important;
        margin-left: auto !important;
        margin-right: auto !important;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 42rem;
      }
      #tg-common-faq h2#tg-faq-title,
      #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-head .tg-faq-sub {
        text-align: center !important;
      }
      .tg-faq h2#tg-faq-title {
        font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 6.5vw, 2.2rem);
      }
      .tg-faq-sub {
        font-size: 1rem;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card {
        padding: 1.35rem 1.15rem;
      }
      details.tg-faq-card > summary .tg-faq-card-q {
        font-size: 1.05rem;
      }
      #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-cta {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }
      .tg-faq-cta {
        border-radius: 1.25rem;
        min-height: 17rem;
        padding: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 3rem) 1.15rem;
      }
      /* Narrower glow so it doesn’t visually pull the block off-center on small widths */
      .tg-faq-cta::before {
        top: 3rem;
        width: 120%;
        max-width: 100%;
        filter: blur(40px);
      }
      #tg-common-faq .tg-faq-cta-inner {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 42rem;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
        align-items: center;
      }
      .tg-faq-cta-actions {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        align-self: center;
        justify-content: center;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 22rem;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
      }
      /* Center label in pill; knob stays position:absolute on the right */
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic {
        display: flex !important;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 22rem;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
        justify-content: center !important;
        min-height: 48px;
        height: auto;
        padding: 0.35rem 3.25rem 0.35rem 1.15rem;
        font-size: clamp(0.78rem, 3vw, 0.875rem);
      }
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic .tg-faq-magnetic-label {
        text-align: center;
      }
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:hover,
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:focus-visible {
        padding: 0.35rem 1.15rem 0.35rem 3.25rem;
      }
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic .tg-faq-magnetic-knob {
        width: 2.35rem;
        height: 2.35rem;
        right: 0.2rem;
      }
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:hover .tg-faq-magnetic-knob,
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:focus-visible .tg-faq-magnetic-knob {
        right: calc(100% - 2.55rem);
      }
      @media (hover: hover) {
        #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic--primary:hover {
          background-color: #e85f0f !important;
        }
      }
    }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      details.tg-faq-card,
      .tg-faq-card-icon,
      .tg-faq-card-icon .material-symbols-outlined,
      .tg-faq-card-chev,
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic,
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic .tg-faq-magnetic-knob {
        transition: none !important;
      }
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:hover,
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:focus-visible {
        padding: 0.25rem 3.5rem 0.25rem 1.5rem !important;
      }
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:hover .tg-faq-magnetic-knob,
      #tg-common-faq a.tg-faq-magnetic:focus-visible .tg-faq-magnetic-knob {
        right: 0.25rem !important;
        transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
      }
      @media (hover: hover) {
        details.tg-faq-card:hover .tg-faq-card-icon {
          transform: none;
          filter: none;
          color: var(--faq-primary);
        }
      }
    }
  </style>
  <div class="tg-faq-inner">
    <header class="tg-faq-head">
      <span class="tg-faq-overline">Support Center</span>
      <h2 id="tg-faq-title">Common Questions We Get</h2>
      <p class="tg-faq-sub">
        Answers to the most common questions we receive — everything you need to know!
      </p>
    </header>
    <div class="tg-faq-grid" role="list">
      <details class="tg-faq-card" role="listitem">
        <summary>
          <div class="tg-faq-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 1.85rem">inventory_2</span>
          </div>
          <span class="tg-faq-card-q">How are the ingredients sourced?</span>
          <span class="material-symbols-outlined tg-faq-card-chev" aria-hidden="true">expand_more</span>
        </summary>
        <div class="tg-faq-card-answer">
          <p>
            We work with trusted local suppliers and prioritize fresh produce and quality ingredients. Everything is selected with care before it
            reaches your tiffin.
          </p>
          <span class="tg-faq-tag">Ingredient sourcing</span>
        </div>
      </details>
      <details class="tg-faq-card" role="listitem">
        <summary>
          <div class="tg-faq-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 1.85rem">delivery_dining</span>
          </div>
          <span class="tg-faq-card-q">What time are tiffins usually delivered?</span>
          <span class="material-symbols-outlined tg-faq-card-chev" aria-hidden="true">expand_more</span>
        </summary>
        <div class="tg-faq-card-answer">
          <p>
            Tiffin delivery times: Mississauga & Brampton: 12 PM – 2 PM; Downtown Toronto, Scarborough, North York, Etobicoke: 8 AM – 10
            AM; Markham: 11 AM – 1 PM; Ajax, Oshawa, Pickering: 2 PM – 4 PM.
          </p>
          <span class="tg-faq-tag">Logistics</span>
        </div>
      </details>
      <details class="tg-faq-card" role="listitem">
        <summary>
          <div class="tg-faq-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 1.85rem">health_and_safety</span>
          </div>
          <span class="tg-faq-card-q">Do you cater to specific dietary needs?</span>
          <span class="material-symbols-outlined tg-faq-card-chev" aria-hidden="true">expand_more</span>
        </summary>
        <div class="tg-faq-card-answer">
          <p>
            Yes. We offer vegetarian and non-vegetarian options and can often accommodate special requests (including vegan where available). Tell us
            your needs when you order and we’ll guide you to the best plan.
          </p>
          <span class="tg-faq-tag">Dietary</span>
        </div>
      </details>
      <details class="tg-faq-card" role="listitem">
        <summary>
          <div class="tg-faq-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 1.85rem">restaurant</span>
          </div>
          <span class="tg-faq-card-q">Can I customize my weekly subscription?</span>
          <span class="material-symbols-outlined tg-faq-card-chev" aria-hidden="true">expand_more</span>
        </summary>
        <div class="tg-faq-card-answer">
          <p>
            Absolutely. You can adjust your plan, swap meals where available, and coordinate pauses with our team — reach out before your delivery
            window so we can help.
          </p>
          <span class="tg-faq-tag">Flexibility</span>
        </div>
      </details>
      <details class="tg-faq-card" role="listitem">
        <summary>
          <div class="tg-faq-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 1.85rem">eco</span>
          </div>
          <span class="tg-faq-card-q">Is the packaging eco-friendly?</span>
          <span class="material-symbols-outlined tg-faq-card-chev" aria-hidden="true">expand_more</span>
        </summary>
        <div class="tg-faq-card-answer">
          <p>
            Sustainability matters to us. We use food-safe packaging and reusable stainless steel tiffins where offered, plus compostable materials when
            that fits your route.
          </p>
          <span class="tg-faq-tag">Environment</span>
        </div>
      </details>
      <details class="tg-faq-card" role="listitem">
        <summary>
          <div class="tg-faq-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 1.85rem">pause_circle</span>
          </div>
          <span class="tg-faq-card-q">Can I skip a week or pause my subscription?</span>
          <span class="material-symbols-outlined tg-faq-card-chev" aria-hidden="true">expand_more</span>
        </summary>
        <div class="tg-faq-card-answer">
          <p>
            Yes. You can skip a week or pause your subscription — just let our team know in advance and we’ll adjust your schedule.
          </p>
          <span class="tg-faq-tag">Subscriptions</span>
        </div>
      </details>
    </div>
    <div class="tg-faq-cta">
      <div class="tg-faq-cta-inner">
        <h2 class="tg-faq-cta-heading">
          Got a question? <span class="tg-faq-cta-accent">We’re one message away.</span>
        </h2>
        <p class="tg-faq-cta-lede">
          Ingredients, delivery windows, plans, or something custom—our kitchen team answers fast on contact or WhatsApp.
        </p>
        <div class="tg-faq-cta-actions">
          <a class="tg-faq-magnetic tg-faq-magnetic--primary" href="https://tiffingrab.ca/contact/">
            <span class="tg-faq-magnetic-label">Contact us</span>
            <span class="tg-faq-magnetic-knob" aria-hidden="true"></span>
          </a>
          <a
            class="tg-faq-magnetic tg-faq-magnetic--wa"
            href="https://wa.me/message/ZHHBFQTZIN7MB1"
            rel="noopener noreferrer"
            target="_blank"
          >
            <span class="tg-faq-magnetic-label">Chat on WhatsApp</span>
            <span class="tg-faq-magnetic-knob" aria-hidden="true"></span>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <script>
    (function () {
      var root = document.getElementById("tg-common-faq");
      if (!root) return;
      var cards = root.querySelectorAll("details.tg-faq-card");
      if (!cards.length) return;
      var mq = window.matchMedia("(min-width: 768px)");
      function syncOpen() {
        var open = mq.matches;
        cards.forEach(function (d) {
          d.open = open;
        });
      }
      syncOpen();
      if (typeof mq.addEventListener === "function") {
        mq.addEventListener("change", syncOpen);
      } else if (typeof mq.addListener === "function") {
        mq.addListener(syncOpen);
      }
    })();
  </script>
</section>
